chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 05 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.67/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.68/2025. 06.02.2026 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Arain, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel, under instructions, does not press the reference application, which is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
